reviews.review_text: Fantastic stay ...Greg was a real down to earth man great stay....i even swam a little knowing there are bull sharks ..lol
Nice campground but DONT HIKE THE CANOE RIDGE TRAIL. Its really steep and a hard hike

Greg & Donna are very nice and accommodating.
Had a great time with there wealth of knowledge

One of a kind tranquil serene beautiful places you could enjoy, fishing swimming boating camping amenities and more a lovely place to visit! And the special
Boy Teddy and partner in crime Missy also the furry friends!
Quiet in off season.old. Right on river. Mostly permanents.  But great spot
Great park, amenities and they even provide fire pits for free, bait is for sale and ice also available. We arrived very late and they were very understanding and hospitable
This is not a caravan park. It is a powered free camp site, but caravan price.
Great spot, caravan option was fantastic! Clean and great service. Restaurants and live music all within walking distance.
Great friendly people,  great boatramp to put any size boat in.

We just spend one night at this lovely camping. It is very well set up and clean.
The location is stunning with the possibility to go for a swim, fishing, etc.
Definitely a camping to put on the list if you're discovering this area.
It also has an amazing restaurant just a minute away with the best prawns ever 😍
Love this place. Such a chilled out relaxing location. Best getaway spot to unwind and relax
the owners are very nice and friendly
Very cool place and cool people !
Really amazing view 😻 !! Thank you so much
